modelName: OC3 Denial of Service - LLM Uplift with Uncertainty
modelDescription: A well-resourced criminal hacker group launches a sustained DDoS campaign against a financial services target during peak business periods, saturating bandwidth and disrupting critical services through botnet traffic, and extorts the victim with ransom demands to halt the attack.

nodes.name: Resource Development: Build Compromise Botnet - Uncertainty
Reconnaissance
nodes.description: The actor performs active scanning of the internet to find SMEs with vulnerable public-facing applications and uses OSINT to confirm the target is financially viable.

nodes.name: Reconnaissance: Gather Victim Network Information - Uncertainty
